articles.title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Ryan Gosling hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
articles.description:
"Project Hail Mary" star Ryan Gosling hosted the March 7 episode of "Saturday Night Live," with Gorillaz as musical guest.

The post ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Ryan Gosling hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ryan Gosling hosted 'Saturday Night Live' on March 7, showcasing his comedic talent.
Gorillaz performed as the musical guest, adding to the episode's entertainment value.
Boston residents can enjoy highlights from the show, enhancing local cultural engagement.

articles.title: Crew member on sunken vessel off Cape Cod has died, officials identify him
articles.description:
The search for another crew member who was not found at the scene has now ended due to weather conditions, officials said.

The post Crew member on sunken vessel off Cape Cod has died, officials identify him appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A crew member from a sunken vessel off Cape Cod has died, identified by officials.
Search for another missing crew member has ended due to adverse weather conditions.
This incident raises concerns about maritime safety for local fishermen and residents.

articles.title: Patriots reportedly among teams interested in Packers’ leading WR in free agency
articles.description:
New England is among a handful of teams monitoring Romeo Doubs, according to a report.

The post Patriots reportedly among teams interested in Packers’ leading WR in free agency appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots express interest in Packers' leading WR Romeo Doubs during free agency.
Doubs led the Packers with 1,000 receiving yards in the 2022 season.
Acquiring Doubs could enhance the Patriots' receiving corps for the upcoming season.
